programmes.show_description: Actress Lana Clarkson was found dead in the home of famed music producer Phil Spector. Spector claims she took her own life, while the evidence says otherwise, but what will the jury decide?
What was the motive behind Erik and Lyle Menendez brutally murdering their parents? The prosecution said it was greed, but the defense claimed a dark family secret led to the killings.
Michael Jackson's personal doctor Conrad Murray took an oath to first do no harm. But that's exactly what prosecutors say Murray did when Jackson died from an overdose of a powerful anesthesia drug.
Sitcom star Rebecca Schaeffer's career was on the rise, until she opened the door of her Hollywood apartment to face to face with her killer, Robert Bardo.
